subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto God, Who hath kindled the lamp of utterance and sustaineth it with the oil of knowledge and wisdom at the pivot of contingent existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اوقد سراج البیان و یمده بدهن العلم و العرفان فی قطب الامکان هو
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
